title: Amphoricarpos neumayeri

The classification of Amphoricarpos neumayeri is within the genus Amphoricarpos, which is a group of Australian plants known for their unique, spiny fruits. The plant is also classified as a member of the order Caryophyllales, which includes various flowering plants with similar characteristics. Further classification places Amphoricarpos neumayeri within the kingdom Plantae, indicating its status as a vascular plant.
